prompt: Create a 3-panel comic where the man in the second image walks into the scene from the first image, triggering the 'Oh my eyes!!' reaction.
prompt_refined:
Generate a 3-panel comic strip using image 1 and image 2 as references.

Panel 1 (left): Depict the background scene from image 1 (the bridge and swirling sky) without the screaming figure or text.

Panel 2 (middle): Mr. Bean from image 2 is depicted walking into the central foreground of the background scene from image 1, maintaining his distinctive animated appearance.

Panel 3 (right): The screaming character from image 1 is shown in an exaggerated state of horror, reacting to Mr. Bean's entrance. The text 'Oh my eyes!! My eyes!!!' from image 1 should be prominently displayed above this character, retaining its original style. The background for this panel should be consistent with the scene from image 1.

The entire comic strip must adopt the distinct artistic style and color palette of image 1.
objects: Screaming figure from image 1 (exaggerated horror in Panel 3)
Text 'Oh my eyes!! My eyes!!!' (in Panel 3, original style)
Screaming figure from image 1 (should not be present in Panel 1)
Text 'Oh my eyes!! My eyes!!!' (should not be present in Panel 1)
